_comment: Contract for Borg page deep-health probes (#2124). Each entry probes the backing API, not the HTML (200 means nothing — pages render with empty panels). Assertion is a python expression evaluated against the parsed JSON response, bound as `d`.

probes.why: Cost page renders empty if any of claude/twilio/clearing aggregators error — summary.totalCost sums all four
13 active hook scripts at last count; allow ±3 for natural churn. Empty list = summary handler broken
4 fitness functions defined; floor at 3 for safety
Quality rollup across repos; zero means scan hasn't run or all repos empty
Patterns is a dict keyed by pattern type; empty means the pattern-detection job never ran or indexer is broken
Replay requires at least one indexed session; zero means session-watcher is dead

probes.assert: isinstance(d.get('summary'), dict) and d['summary'].get('domains', 0) > 0 and d['summary'].get('nodes', 0) > 0
probes.why: Topology summary carries domain+node counts; both zero means the codebase graph never built or watcher is dead
Posture strip returns JSON with frames + total; zero frames means posture-capture cron is dead
